content.en:
"All the high-level realm gods of the Heavenly Fire God Alliance, please leave!"

Ye Xingchen expelled.

However, these high-level realm gods of the Heavenly Fire God Alliance were unmoved, so they wouldn't leave directly!

"Catch him directly!" ~ said the God of Hellfire.

Rumble!!!!

These high-level realm gods suppressed Ye Xingchen with momentum, while the Hell Realm gods directly attacked.

In his opinion, his own attack was enough to capture Ye Xingchen, and other high-level realm gods could assist to prevent Ye Xingchen from escaping.

But soon, the gods of Hell were stunned.

I saw that the blow of the Hell Realm God did not break Ye Xingchen's defense, even if he didn't make a full attack, but he was still a high-level realm god who had condensed eight Eternal Realm Spirits, and he couldn't help a high-level Realm God who had condensed seven Eternal Realm Spirits.

"It's too weak!"

Ye Xingchen sneered.

Immediately afterward, he fought with the Hell Realm God, and injured the Hell Realm God with just one move.

In terms of strength, Ye Xingchen's combat power can be called invincible among the high-level realm gods who condense the eight Eternal Realm Gods, and only the high-level realm gods who have condensed the nine Eternal Realm Spirits can defeat him.

"Let's get on it!"

The god of Hell shouted.

These high-level realm gods shot together and besieged Ye Xingchen.

Thundered!!!

Ye Xingchen fell into a bitter battle for a while, after all, his strength was not much stronger than the Hell Realm God, and there was more than one high-level Realm God like the Hell Realm God, plus other high-level Realm Gods shot together, it was not easy for him to defeat this group of high-level Realm Gods.

However, this group of high-level realm gods couldn't help him.

They kept fighting, and the fluctuations spread, and they also attracted the attention of many human realm gods.

But this group of Terran Realm Gods did not dare to intervene, after all, their strength was too weak, where was the opponent of the high-level Realm Gods, they did not even have the qualifications to intervene, and a little fluctuation could shatter their bodies and kill them.

However, many realm gods contacted Ye Tian and reported the information.

Of course, these realm gods also knew very well that it was impossible for Ye Tian not to notice such a battle, but the procedures that should have been done still had to be done.

......

Ye Tian naturally knew about this battle and secretly observed, but he didn't make a move.

His son Ye Xingchen's strength is enough to deal with this battle, he can just look at it.

As time passed, some high-level realm gods began to be injured on the side of the Heavenly Fire God Alliance, and the injuries were not light.

"You retreat!"

The Hell Realm Gods let those weaker high-level realm gods retreat, otherwise if they fall a few high-level realm gods, it will be too much of a loss, and they will not be able to make up for the losses if they occupy these human realms!

Whoa!!

A high-level realm god of the Heavenly Fire God Alliance retreated, and the remaining high-level realm gods lost these helpers, so it would be difficult to compete with Ye Xingchen.

Finally, the gods of Hell retreated.

"Let's go!"

These high-level realm gods disappeared in the blink of an eye.

And after these Heavenly Fire God Alliance's high-level realm gods left, Ye Xingchen also shuttled in front of Ye Tian.

"Father, the high-level realm gods of the Heavenly Fire God Alliance have retreated!"

Ye Xingchen said.

"I know, I have to be vigilant next, the Heavenly Fire God Alliance has lost face this time, it may not be just like that, it is very likely that it will come again!" Ye Tian guessed.

"Father, if the Heavenly Fire Divine Alliance comes again, I will definitely defeat them again!" Ye Xingchen said confidently.

"No, the next time they come back, it is very likely that they will send a high-level peak realm god who has condensed nine Eternal Realm Spirits, you are not an opponent of this kind of realm god!" Ye Tian reminded.

"If such a high-level peak realm god really comes, then only my father will take action personally!"

Ye Xingchen hurriedly said.

Subsequently, Ye Tian asked Ye Xingchen to go down.

......

The realm of the gods.

At this moment, the Hell Realm Gods and them returned, and they were extremely angry one by one, and immediately reported this matter to the Heavenly Phoenix Realm Gods.

"Heavenly Phoenix Realm God, we have been defeated by the Human Race, Ye Xingchen, a high-level Realm God of the Human Race, can compete with us with his own strength, and even occupy a certain advantage!"

"Ye Xingchen, who is this guy, and he still has this strength?"

The gods of the Heavenly Phoenix Realm were shocked.

"Ye Xingchen is the son of Ye Tian, the leader of the human race, and we didn't investigate his strength before, but we didn't expect him to be able to fight us with the strength of seven Eternal Realm Spirits!" []

The Heavenly Phoenix Realm God frowned slightly: "Ye Xingchen, this son's Eternal Realm Spirit is very likely to be a perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit, otherwise it is impossible to fight beyond the level." "

"How rare is the Perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance, and only the Supreme Force has such a inheritance, why does the Human Race have such a inheritance?" they were extremely surprised.

"It's just a guess now, but this possibility is very high, according to my understanding, Ye Tian's strength is not weak, and he can also fight beyond the level. Therefore, there is a great possibility that the human race has a perfect-level Eternal Dao Inheritance, and there is even more than one Perfect Eternal Realm Spirit!"

The Heavenly Phoenix Realm God said.

"If the human race really has a perfect-level Eternal Realm Spirit Inheritance, can this inheritance continue to be inherited? If it can, then it can be taken over!"

They had only heard that the Perfect Eternal Realm Spirit was very powerful, but they had to practice it themselves to know how much.

"I'll do it myself!"

The Heavenly Phoenix Realm God said.

After all, the gods of the Hell Realm have all failed to make a move, and if he doesn't make a move, he won't be able to take down the human race at all!

"If you make a move, the human race will definitely be defeated. "

Said the god of Hellfire.

"After all, the Terrans are a powerful force, and this matter can't be too big. You also asked the Realm Court Headquarters to suppress the influence of this matter, and don't spread it, otherwise it will seem that our Heavenly Fire God Alliance is bullying the small. The Heavenly Phoenix Realm God admonished.

"Yes!"

Many high-level realm gods responded to the Dao.

......

Subsequently.

The Heavenly Phoenix Realm God took a dozen or so high-level Realm Gods to the Terran Endless Kingdom Alliance in the Eternal Realm Realm.

It didn't take long for the Heavenly Phoenix Realm Gods to come.

But this time, it was not Ye Xingchen who stopped them, but Ye Tian who stopped them.

"Heavenly Fire God Alliance, dare to come to the Terran Territory!"

Ye Tian said coldly.

"You are the God of the Ye Heaven Realm!"

The Heavenly Phoenix Realm God said with a smile.

"Heavenly Phoenix Realm God, what are you doing?" Ye Tian recognized the Heavenly Phoenix Realm God and asked.

Seeing that Ye Tian knew himself, the Heavenly Phoenix Realm God said directly: "Ye Heavenly Realm God, you know me, you should know my strength, I will come this time for two things, one is to let the human race give up eighty percent of the territory, and the second thing is to want your human race's perfect eternal realm spirit inheritance nine!"
